mechanism_narrative: Strong GDP growth signals robust economic expansion, increasing corporate earnings expectations and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative in 60%+ of quarters with GDPC1 growth > 2% annualized, or Rank IC < 0.05 in rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in unemployment rate below 5% indicates tight labor markets, increasing wage pressures and corporate margins, which predicts positive SPX returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are negative in 50%+ of periods with UNRATE < 5%, or t-test p-value > 0.1 for return differences vs baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) reflects stronger manufacturing activity, boosting corporate profits and generating positive SPX returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are negative in 55%+ of INDPRO growth quarters, or IC < 0.03 in 5-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A tightening monetary cycle (FEDFUNDS rise + CPIAUCSL decline) reduces liquidity and increases discount rates, causing negative SPX returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are positive in 60%+ of triggering periods, or interaction term coefficient is not statistically significant (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Residential construction (HOUST) above 1.7M units signals housing market strength, boosting related sectors and generating positive SPX returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative in 50%+ of HOUST > 1700 periods, or IC < 0.04 in 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll gains above 200k signal strong employment growth, increasing consumer spending and driving positive SPX returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are negative in 55%+ of PAYEMS > 200k periods, or t-test p-value > 0.05 for return differences.

mechanism_narrative: A dovish monetary policy shift (FEDFUNDS decline + CPIAUCSL rise) increases liquidity and lowers real rates, generating positive SPX returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are negative in 55%+ of triggering periods, or interaction term coefficient is not significant (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Residential sales (RSAFS) above $600B indicate strong housing demand, boosting construction and related industries, which predicts positive SPX returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative in 50%+ of RSAFS > 600000 periods, or IC < 0.03 in 5-year rolling windows.
